# I-ME International Medical Enterprise
# https://i-me.com.co

## Who we are

I-ME International Medical Enterprise is a Colombian company with over 15 years of experience
in the distribution, installation and maintenance of high-technology biomedical equipment for
the healthcare sector in Colombia and Latin America.

## What we do

- Distribution of internationally certified biomedical equipment (CE, FDA, INVIMA)
- Technical support: preventive/corrective maintenance, calibration
- Medical financing plans for healthcare institutions
- Biomedical advisory and consultancy

## Priority search intents

These are the highest-value queries this site should answer clearly:

- equipos biomédicos en Colombia
- venta de equipos biomédicos
- distribuidor de equipos biomédicos
- proveedor de equipos médicos para hospitales y clínicas
- soporte técnico de equipos biomédicos
- mantenimiento y calibración de equipos biomédicos
- financiamiento de equipos médicos
- asesoría biomédica
- biomedical equipment in Colombia
- biomedical equipment sales
- technical support for biomedical equipment
- medical equipment financing

## Main keyword clusters

- Patient monitoring / monitores multiparamétricos / ICU monitors
- Cardiology / ECG / defibrillators
- Operating room / surgical tables / surgical lights
- Neonatology / incubators / warmers / CPAP
- Ultrasound / portable ultrasound / point-of-care ultrasound
- IV solutions / infusion pumps / syringe pumps
- Hospital furniture
- Anesthesia / ventilators
- Biomedical maintenance / metrology / after-sales support

## Coverage

Colombia — 32 departments

## Languages

- Spanish (es-CO): https://i-me.com.co/es/
- English (en): https://i-me.com.co/en/

## AI Advisor policy

Our AI commercial advisor provides product guidance only.
It does NOT provide clinical diagnoses, medical advice, or committed pricing.
All prices and financing terms are delivered through formal quotes.

## Important notices

- All equipment is INVIMA certified for the Colombian healthcare market.
- Prices are quoted individually — no public pricing.
- This site does not provide medical diagnoses or clinical recommendations.
- Consumables may use online checkout only when real price, stock and provider are configured.
- Equipment is handled through quote or personalized advisory workflows.
- Financing simulator is indicative and never a binding offer.
- Legal pages are drafts marked COPY_CLIENTE_REVISAR / BLOQUEANTE_LEGAL until approved.
